summary: Comprehensive testing of Learn Page CMS completed. All 7 tabs (Settings, Ask Mira, Topics, Content, Bundles, Products, Services) are fully functional. Backend API GET/POST /api/learn/page-config working correctly - saves and retrieves config, topics, dailyTips, guidedPaths, helpBuckets. AI images status endpoint at /api/ai-images/status is operational (currently idle).

backend_tests.test_get_page_config: PASSED - Returns config, topics, selectedBundles, selectedProducts, selectedServices, dailyTips, guidedPaths, helpBuckets
backend_tests.test_page_config_structure: PASSED - Config has pillar=learn, title, subtitle, themeColor, askMira object
backend_tests.test_topics_structure: PASSED - Topics have id, title, slug, description, image, subtopics, videos, products, services
backend_tests.test_post_page_config: PASSED - Successfully saves and persists all CMS data
backend_tests.test_ai_images_status: PASSED - Returns running, type, total, completed, progress fields

frontend_tests.cms_loads: PASSED - Learn Page CMS visible at /admin?tab=learn-cms
frontend_tests.settings_tab: PASSED - Page Settings (Title, Subtitle, Theme Color), Hero Image upload, Section Visibility toggles
frontend_tests.ask_mira_tab: PASSED - Enable toggle, Placeholder Text, Button Color, Quick Suggestions
frontend_tests.topics_tab: PASSED - Topics list, Add Topic button, Topic editor with subtopics/videos/products/services
frontend_tests.content_tab: PASSED - Daily Learning Tips, Guided Learning Paths, Help Buckets
frontend_tests.products_tab: PASSED - Featured Products grid (Professional Training Clicker Set, Training Treat Pouch, etc.)
frontend_tests.services_tab: PASSED - Featured Services list (Puppy Training Basics, Obedience Training, Behavior Consultation, Agility Training, Advanced Training)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Learn Page CMS fully functional with 7 tabs. API endpoints: GET/POST /api/learn/page-config handle all CMS data including config, topics, selectedBundles, selectedProducts, selectedServices, dailyTips, guidedPaths, helpBuckets. AI images endpoint at /api/ai-images/status returns status object. All UI tabs navigate correctly using [role='tab'] selectors.

cms_tabs.name: Products
features: Featured Products selection grid with product cards
